intro: Neoporteria melanacantha, also known as the Black Spine Cactus, is a species of cactus in the genus Neoporteria, characterized by its dark, almost black spines and vibrant yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and inflammation, due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Neoporteria melanacantha include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. Neoporteria melanacantha is commonly used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as topical creams and ointments, to leverage its medicinal properties.
